title: mostuea neurocarpa
intro: Mostuea neurocarpa, also known as the neurocarp, is a plant species in the family Loganiaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in alkaloids, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, offering various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Mostuea neurocarpa are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
